sheets.name: Performance Verification
sheets.sourceNote: Source: Physical paper records photographed 25 May 2026 | Covers Preventive Maintenance sessions July 2016

Manufacturer: Sheng ang canta Medical Tech Co.Ltd
Technicians: Tebeje Beyene, Atnafu Gojo, Getie, Chernet, Mesfin
Test Equipment Used: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002)
Remarks / Performance Summary: 5 of 8 units satisfactory for all parameters; 2 units unsatisfactory for O2 purity & cycle pressure on analyzer; 1 unit unsatisfactory for O2 purity & cycle pressure.
Battery alarm, power failure test, battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory (model-specific range).
Battery test load alarm pass. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.
O2 alarm pass; air failure alarm pass. Breathing circuit leak test pass. O2 calibration N/A. Tidal volume, breath rate, O2 concentration generally satisfactory. Some pressure deviations noted.

O2 alarm, air failure alarm pass. Breathing circuit leak — N/A (anesthesia unit). O2 calibration pass. Tidal volume, breath rate, O2 concentration pass. Pressure readings unsatisfactory; parameters measured 11 times — average unacceptable per ISO 80601-2-12-2011(E).
O2 alarm, air failure alarm pass. O2 calibration N/A (anesthesia unit). Tidal volume 360ml (limit 270–330) — FAIL. PEEP pass.
O2 purity & battery voltage satisfactory. Battery alarm, power failure alarm, cycle pressure unsatisfactory.
O2 purity & battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure unsatisfactory.
O2 purity satisfactory. Battery alarm & power failure alarm unsatisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.
O2 purity unsatisfactory on analyzer. Battery alarm & power failure alarm, battery voltage satisfactory.
O2 purity, battery alarm, power failure alarm, battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.
Similar results to above. FIO2, tidal volume, breath rate satisfactory. Pressure, frequency readings unsatisfactory.

sheets.name: Work Orders
sheets.sourceNote: Source: Physical work order binder photographed 25 May 2026 | Biomedical Engineering Case Team

Issue Description: Device not powering on — fault detected
Potentiometer not working — unable to change intensity
Usability Impact: Unable to use; Delay in treatment
Corrective Action Taken: (b) Adjust mechanical part; (d) Restore functionality (button/touch screen)
(f) Lubrication; (m) Other: Unscrew the motor and cleaned
(g) Tightening loose connection; (h) Replace/repair broken wiring
Check power supply connection; Self-test/functionality test
Completed By: Abel Getachew, Gereusalem Mondero, Hosat Seid

sheets.name: Preventive Maintenance
sheets.sourceNote: Source: PM binder photographed 25 May 2026 | Menelik II CSH Biomedical Engineering Case Team

Tasks Performed:
1. Checked power source
2. Covered area and calibration check
3. Cleaned with saline

1. Cleaned with gauze & alcohol
2. Checked parameters (setup/calibration)
3. Checked power source
